description: Beaface Is Born For Classic Men's Accessories. We Have Brought A Wide Variety Of Classic Clothing Accessories Such As Ties, Cravats, Braces, etc. For Men. We Will Not Stop There. NOW WE ARE PROUD TO LAUNCH MEN'S BELT SERIES Beaface men's belt collection includes different kinds of belt styles from the Middle Ages classics to the 21st century hot. We believe there are always some that will be your favorite. This Belt Attract You Now: Belt Name: Beaface Men Solid Color Stretch Belt Belt Type: Elasticated, No Hole, One Size Fits Most.
